# 🧊 3D (169)

Text in, geometry out. These repos turn prompts and photos into meshes, splats, and full scenes, collapsing the gap between an idea and a renderable 3D world.

[↑ Back to index](../README.md)

## Mesh Generation

Spin up textured, game-ready 3D models from a text prompt or single image

<details>
<summary>Show 52 repos</summary>

- [microsoft/TRELLIS.2](https://github.com/microsoft/TRELLIS.2) — ⭐ 6,949 · `Python` · Paper Code — This project explores the use of native and compact structured latent representations to facilitate the generation of 3D content.
- [facebookresearch/sam-3d-objects](https://github.com/facebookresearch/sam-3d-objects) — ⭐ 6,804 · `Python` · Paper Code — This project provides code to reconstruct textured 3D objects directly from single 2D images. It aims to generate detailed 3D models from minimal input using techniques related to object segmentation.
- [VAST-AI-Research/TripoSR](https://github.com/VAST-AI-Research/TripoSR) — ⭐ 6,519 · `Python` · Paper Code — TripoSR is a research project providing code for fast 3D object reconstruction, capable of generating textured 3D models from a single input image in under 0.5 seconds.
- [Tencent-Hunyuan/Hunyuan3D-2.1](https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/Hunyuan3D-2.1) — ⭐ 3,553 · `Python` · Library — A Python-based project that generates high-fidelity 3D assets, including production-ready PBR materials, from input images or text.
- [Adam-CAD/CADAM](https://github.com/Adam-CAD/CADAM) — ⭐ 3,432 · `TypeScript` · Application — CADAM is an open-source web application that allows users to generate 3D CAD models from text descriptions. It leverages AI agents and LLMs for mechanical engineering and robotics design, producing STL files.
- [lightningpixel/modly](https://github.com/lightningpixel/modly) — ⭐ 2,480 · `TypeScript` · Application — Modly is a desktop application that uses local AI on your GPU to generate 3D models from input images. It allows for the creation of three-dimensional assets without relying on cloud services or API fees.
- [wgsxm/PartCrafter](https://github.com/wgsxm/PartCrafter) — ⭐ 2,414 · `Python` · Paper Code — PartCrafter is a research project that generates structured, multi-part 3D mesh objects from single input images using compositional latent diffusion transformers.
- [earthtojake/text-to-cad](https://github.com/earthtojake/text-to-cad) — ⭐ 2,056 · `JavaScript` · Framework — An open-source framework for generating CAD (Computer-Aided Design) models from text descriptions, leveraging AI agents to transform text into 3D model formats.
- [martin226/vibe-draw](https://github.com/martin226/vibe-draw) — ⭐ 2,031 · `TypeScript` · Application — This application allows users to transform rough 2D sketches into stunning 3D worlds using a method called 'vibe drawing'.
- [fogleman/sdf](https://github.com/fogleman/sdf) — ⭐ 1,936 · `Python` · Library — This Python library facilitates the generation of 3D meshes using Signed Distance Functions (SDF) and Constructive Solid Geometry (CSG). It is useful for creating and manipulating 3D models, potentially for applications like 3D printing.
- [VAST-AI-Research/TripoSG](https://github.com/VAST-AI-Research/TripoSG) — ⭐ 1,637 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository provides code for TripoSG, a method that generates high-fidelity 3D meshes from images using large-scale rectified flow models.
- [ferdous-alam/GenCAD](https://github.com/ferdous-alam/GenCAD) — ⭐ 1,559 · `Python` · Application — A tool designed for the generative creation of CAD (Computer-Aided Design) models. It aims to automate the design process for engineering and manufacturing applications.
- [HengyiWang/spann3r](https://github.com/HengyiWang/spann3r) — ⭐ 1,128 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository implements spann3r, a system for real-time 3D reconstruction of scenes using spatial memory. It can reconstruct 3D scenes at high frame rates from visual input.
- [geopavlakos/hamer](https://github.com/geopavlakos/hamer) — ⭐ 1,003 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository provides code for HaMeR, a method that reconstructs 3D hand meshes using Transformer models.
- [Roblox/cube](https://github.com/Roblox/cube) — ⭐ 958 · `Jupyter Notebook` · Paper Code — This project introduces CubePart, a Roblox Foundation Model for 3D intelligence focused on part-controllable 3D asset generation. It generates semantically decomposed 3D assets directly from text prompts and user-defined schemas, enabling direct integration into downstream applications.
- [nv-tlabs/NKSR](https://github.com/nv-tlabs/NKSR) — ⭐ 944 · `Cuda` · Paper Code — NKSR (Neural Kernel Surface Reconstruction) is a research project, highlighted at CVPR 2023, focused on reconstructing 3D meshes from large-scale sparse point clouds using neural kernels.
- [rundiwu/DeepCAD](https://github.com/rundiwu/DeepCAD) — ⭐ 772 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository provides the code for DeepCAD, a deep generative network designed for creating 3D Computer-Aided Design (CAD) models, as presented in their ICCV 2021 paper.
- [facebookresearch/ShapeR](https://github.com/facebookresearch/ShapeR) — ⭐ 762 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository contains the code for the ShapeR research paper, focusing on generating metric 3D shapes directly from casual video inputs.
- [PKU-YuanGroup/UltraShape-1.0](https://github.com/PKU-YuanGroup/UltraShape-1.0) — ⭐ 750 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository presents UltraShape-1.0, a method for generating high-fidelity 3D shapes through scalable geometric refinement.
- [hoainho/img2threejs](https://github.com/hoainho/img2threejs) — ⭐ 677 · `Python` · Library — This project offers an AI-powered solution to convert a single reference image into a procedural, code-only, animation-ready 3D model using Three.js, focusing on token-efficient image-to-3D generation.
- [GAP-LAB-CUHK-SZ/ReconViaGen](https://github.com/GAP-LAB-CUHK-SZ/ReconViaGen) — ⭐ 588 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository presents ReconViaGen, a method for accurate 3D object reconstruction from multiple image views, utilizing generative approaches. It aims to reconstruct 3D models from image inputs, published as part of ICLR 2026.
- [visualbruno/ComfyUI-Trellis2](https://github.com/visualbruno/ComfyUI-Trellis2) — ⭐ 570 · `Python` · Plugin/Extension — This is a custom node (wrapper) for ComfyUI that integrates Microsoft Trellis.2, providing native and compact structured latents specifically for 3D generation. It also supports Pixel3D.
- [VAST-AI-Research/AniGen](https://github.com/VAST-AI-Research/AniGen) — ⭐ 391 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository provides research code for AniGen, a method to generate animate-ready 3D assets from single images using unified S^3 Fields. It focuses on creating complete 3D models suitable for animation, including rigging and skinning capabilities.
- [facebookresearch/actionmesh](https://github.com/facebookresearch/actionmesh) — ⭐ 346 · `Python` · Application — ActionMesh is a tool that converts video input into high-quality animated 3D mesh models. These generated meshes can be seamlessly imported into any 3D software for further use.
- [zcai0612/UP2You](https://github.com/zcai0612/UP2You) — ⭐ 302 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository provides the official implementation for "UP2You," a research project aimed at reconstructing textured 3D meshes from unconstrained 2D photos. It allows users to generate detailed 3D models from collections of images.
- [JarrentWu1031/AnimateAnyMesh](https://github.com/JarrentWu1031/AnimateAnyMesh) — ⭐ 285 · `Python` · Paper Code — This project provides the official code for AnimateAnyMesh, a feed-forward 4D foundation model designed for text-driven universal animation of arbitrary 3D meshes.
- [json87/SphereSfM](https://github.com/json87/SphereSfM) — ⭐ 274 · `C++` · Library — SphereSfM is a project implementing Structure from Motion (SfM) to reconstruct 3D models from spherical camera images. It processes ERP format images within the ColMap framework.
- [yangtiming/Fast-SAM-3D-Body](https://github.com/yangtiming/Fast-SAM-3D-Body) — ⭐ 227 · `Python` · Library — This project provides a fast method for real-time recovery of 3D human body meshes from single RGB images. It's designed to accelerate the generation of 3D human body models from 2D visual input.
- [HKU-MMLab/OmniPart](https://github.com/HKU-MMLab/OmniPart) — ⭐ 216 · `Python` · Paper Code — This project, OmniPart, focuses on generating part-aware 3D models with structural cohesion and semantic decoupling. It aims to create high-quality, organized 3D content.
- [facex-engine/facex](https://github.com/facex-engine/facex) — ⭐ 200 · `C` · Library — This project provides a comprehensive facial processing toolkit, including detection, 3D mesh generation, recognition, and anti-spoofing, designed to run entirely client-side within a web browser using WebAssembly. It offers a production-ready solution for integrating advanced face AI capabilities into web applications without server-side processing.
- [vinhhien112/Three.js-Object-Sculptor-Codex-Plugin](https://github.com/vinhhien112/Three.js-Object-Sculptor-Codex-Plugin) — ⭐ 189 · `Python` · Plugin/Extension — This is a Codex plugin that converts attached object images into animation-ready procedural Three.js models, generating pure code. It provides a multi-stage sculpting process for AI-powered 3D model creation from images.
- [RareSense/Nova3D](https://github.com/RareSense/Nova3D) — ⭐ 153 · `Dart` · Application — An open-source client for Nova3D, allowing editable and part-aware 3D generation from text prompts or reference images. It generates Blender Python scripts rather than static mesh files, enabling individual editing of 3D model components.
- [facebookresearch/meshflow](https://github.com/facebookresearch/meshflow) — ⭐ 135 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository provides code for the MeshFlow paper, which focuses on efficient artistic 3D mesh generation using MeshVAE and Flow-based Diffusion Transformers. It enables researchers to generate high-quality 3D meshes programmatically.
- [forgent3d/forgent3d](https://github.com/forgent3d/forgent3d) — ⭐ 126 · `TypeScript` · AI Agent — A system that uses AI and local coding agents to generate parametric 3D models from text descriptions, effectively functioning as an AI-powered CAD tool.
- [AutodeskAILab/AutoBrep](https://github.com/AutodeskAILab/AutoBrep) — ⭐ 91 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository contains the official codebase for the AutoBrep paper, focusing on autoregressive B-Rep generation, integrating unified topology and geometry for 3D modeling research.
- [flowful-ai/cad-skill](https://github.com/flowful-ai/cad-skill) — ⭐ 75 · `Python` · Skill Pack — This repository offers a Claude Code skill that enables AI agents to generate parametric 3D-printable models using CadQuery. It facilitates the creation of 3D designs from natural language descriptions.
- [apple/ml-lito](https://github.com/apple/ml-lito) — ⭐ 68 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository contains the code and models for LiTo, an Apple research project dedicated to interactive image-to-3D generation. It employs surface light field tokenization to create detailed 3D representations from 2D images, with specific support for Apple Silicon.
- [physx-omni/PhysX-Omni](https://github.com/physx-omni/PhysX-Omni) — ⭐ 66 · `Jupyter Notebook` · Paper Code — PhysX-Omni is a framework for the unified generation of simulation-ready physical 3D objects, including rigid, deformable, and articulated types. It introduces a method for creating 3D models suitable for physics simulations, alongside a diverse dataset and a new benchmark.
- [lyehe/build\_gpu\_colmap](https://github.com/lyehe/build_gpu_colmap) — ⭐ 61 · `PowerShell` · CLI Tool — This repository provides build scripts and a prebuilt Caspar GPU solver to enable GPU acceleration for COLMAP and pycolmap, aiming to significantly speed up 3D reconstruction and mapping tasks.
- [Visual-AI/speed3r](https://github.com/Visual-AI/speed3r) — ⭐ 55 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository presents Speed3R, a research project on sparse feed-forward 3D reconstruction models. It offers significantly faster processing for large view sequences with minimal accuracy loss and is designed to be plug-and-play with existing systems like VGGT and π³.
- [TencentARC/Pixal3D](https://github.com/TencentARC/Pixal3D) — ⭐ 45 · `Python` · Paper Code — Pixal3D introduces a novel pixel-aligned paradigm for high-fidelity 3D generation from images, addressing current bottlenecks in achieving realistic 3D asset creation beyond mere plausibility. This project is slated for SIGGRAPH 2026.
- [HorizonRobotics/3D-Fixer](https://github.com/HorizonRobotics/3D-Fixer) — ⭐ 44 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository presents 3D-Fixer, a method for coarse-to-fine in-place completion of 3D scenes from a single input image. It focuses on generating complete 3D scene representations.
- [HKU-MMLab/PhysForge](https://github.com/HKU-MMLab/PhysForge) — ⭐ 44 · Library — PhysForge provides code for generating physics-grounded 3D assets to create interactive virtual worlds and synthesize realistic 3D content for simulations, games, or VR applications.
- [google/GNM](https://github.com/google/GNM) — ⭐ 39 · `Python` · Library — GNM is a state-of-the-art parametric 3D statistical model of the human face and head. It provides fine-grained control over facial identity and expressions, learned from a large dataset of 3D scans.
- [mattzh72/articraft](https://github.com/mattzh72/articraft) — ⭐ 36 · `Python` · AI Agent — Articraft is an agentic system designed for scalable generation of articulated 3D assets. It operates by writing and executing code, receiving validation feedback, and refining the output into simulation-ready 3D objects complete with parts, joints, and motion.
- [Saganaki22/Pixal3D-ComfyUI](https://github.com/Saganaki22/Pixal3D-ComfyUI) — ⭐ 36 · `Python` · Plugin/Extension — This repository provides custom nodes for ComfyUI, enabling local Pixal3D image-to-3D generation with textured GLB export. It supports generating high-fidelity 3D assets from a single image, offering features like FlashAttention selection and camera control.
- [qq456cvb/Img2CAD](https://github.com/qq456cvb/Img2CAD) — ⭐ 31 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository supports a workshop and challenge focused on industrial-grade CAD reconstruction from visual evidence, exploring how generative AI can transform images into 3D CAD models.
- [ShirleyMaxx/REST3D](https://github.com/ShirleyMaxx/REST3D) — ⭐ 22 · Paper Code — REST3D is a project that generates visually consistent and physically stable interactive 3D scenes using just a single casual image as input, effectively reconstructing 3D environments from 2D data.
- [karimknaebel/surge](https://github.com/karimknaebel/surge) — ⭐ 18 · `Python` · Paper Code — A project focused on improving surface geometry reconstruction from point maps. It provides code and a demo for advanced 3D scene understanding and rendering techniques, likely stemming from a research paper.
- [rms80/trellis2cpp](https://github.com/rms80/trellis2cpp) — ⭐ 18 · `C++` · Library — This C++/ggml port of TRELLIS.2 converts input images into watertight 3D meshes, serving as a foundational tool for 3D geometry processing.
- [huangserva/3DCellForge](https://github.com/huangserva/3DCellForge) — ⭐ 15 · `JavaScript` · Application — 3DCellForge is an AI-powered interactive studio designed for generating and exploring 3D models, specifically cells. It integrates with online image-to-3D services and supports adapting to other services or local models for 3D content creation.
- [Rizzlord/ComfyUI-Pixal3D-D](https://github.com/Rizzlord/ComfyUI-Pixal3D-D) — ⭐ 10 · `Python` · Plugin/Extension — This repository contains a ComfyUI node for Pixal3D-D, enabling users to integrate its 3D capabilities within the ComfyUI workflow.

</details>

## NeRF/Gaussian Splatting

Reconstruct photoreal scenes from a handful of photos and fly the camera anywhere

<details>
<summary>Show 27 repos</summary>

- [microsoft/TRELLIS](https://github.com/microsoft/TRELLIS) — ⭐ 12,530 · `Python` · Paper Code — TRELLIS is an official repository for a research paper on a 3D generation model. It converts text or images into high-quality 3D assets, supporting various output formats like Radiance Fields, 3D Gaussians, and Meshes, and allows for flexible editing.
- [apple/ml-sharp](https://github.com/apple/ml-sharp) — ⭐ 8,491 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository provides the code for SHARP, a model designed for sharp monocular view synthesis, capable of generating new 3D views from a single 2D image in less than a second.
- [playcanvas/supersplat](https://github.com/playcanvas/supersplat) — ⭐ 5,646 · `TypeScript` · Application — Supersplat is a web-based editor for 3D Gaussian Splatting, a technique for representing and rendering 3D scenes. It provides tools for manipulating and creating 3D splats, useful for 3D content generation and editing.
- [ArthurBrussee/brush](https://github.com/ArthurBrussee/brush) — ⭐ 4,077 · `Rust` · Application — A free, open-source application that performs 3D reconstruction, specifically focusing on generating high-quality Gaussian Splatting models from input data.
- [MrNeRF/LichtFeld-Studio](https://github.com/MrNeRF/LichtFeld-Studio) — ⭐ 3,065 · `C++` · Application — LichtFeld Studio is a native desktop application for comprehensively managing 3D Gaussian Splatting scenes, allowing users to train, inspect, edit, automate, and export them.
- [muskie82/MonoGS](https://github.com/muskie82/MonoGS) — ⭐ 2,078 · `Python` · Paper Code — MonoGS is a monocular Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) system that leverages 3D Gaussian Splatting for real-time scene reconstruction. It was recognized at CVPR'24 with a highlight and a Best Demo Award.
- [Linketic/CityGaussian](https://github.com/Linketic/CityGaussian) — ⭐ 1,176 · `Jupyter Notebook` · Paper Code — CityGaussian is a research project presented at ECCV\`24 and ICLR\`25, focusing on high-quality, large-scale 3D city scene reconstruction using Gaussian Splatting techniques.
- [fastgs/FastGS](https://github.com/fastgs/FastGS) — ⭐ 1,040 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository provides the official code for FastGS, a method designed to significantly accelerate the training of 3D Gaussian Splatting models, achieving results in just 100 seconds. It's intended for researchers and developers working with efficient 3D scene representation.
- [manycoretech/aholo-viewer](https://github.com/manycoretech/aholo-viewer) — ⭐ 892 · `TypeScript` · Library — Aholo Viewer is a high-performance, browser-based 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) renderer that enables efficient streaming and rendering of massive 3DGS scenes and hybrid rendering with meshes. It supports web and mobile platforms, provides an npm package for easy integration, and offers AI-assisted development features.
- [Lewis-Stuart-11/3DGS-to-PC](https://github.com/Lewis-Stuart-11/3DGS-to-PC) — ⭐ 761 · `Python` · CLI Tool — This Python tool converts 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) representations into dense point clouds. It leverages the high fidelity of 3DGS to generate point clouds that are more compatible with standard 3D viewers like CloudCompare and Potree.
- [electronicarts/mesh2splat](https://github.com/electronicarts/mesh2splat) — ⭐ 738 · `C++` · Library — This repository provides a fast C++ utility to convert 3D meshes into 3D Gaussian Splats, enabling rapid transformation between these 3D representations.
- [chenguolin/DiffSplat](https://github.com/chenguolin/DiffSplat) — ⭐ 508 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository provides the official implementation for "DiffSplat," a method that repurposes image diffusion models to generate 3D Gaussian splats from single images rapidly. It allows for the creation of 3D representations from 2D inputs, making 3D content creation more efficient.
- [HKUST-SAIL/Geometry-Grounded-Gaussian-Splatting](https://github.com/HKUST-SAIL/Geometry-Grounded-Gaussian-Splatting) — ⭐ 341 · `C++` · Paper Code — This project focuses on Geometry-Grounded Gaussian Splatting, likely related to 3D scene representation or generation using this technique.
- [facebookresearch/lagernvs](https://github.com/facebookresearch/lagernvs) — ⭐ 339 · `Python` · Paper Code — LagerNVS provides official code for a research paper on latent geometry for fully neural real-time novel view synthesis. It enables generating new views of a scene from limited input.
- [mudler/depth-anything.cpp](https://github.com/mudler/depth-anything.cpp) — ⭐ 271 · `C++` · Library — This is a C++17/ggml port of the Depth Anything 3 model, enabling local GPU inference to convert phone video into 3D point clouds. It focuses on robustly handling messy video inputs to reconstruct 3D environments.
- [bring-shrubbery/ml-sharp-web](https://github.com/bring-shrubbery/ml-sharp-web) — ⭐ 268 · `TypeScript` · Application — This is a web-based playground that enables users to create 3D Gaussian Splats from images using Apple's SHARP machine learning model, running entirely client-side in the browser. It allows users to input an image and output Gaussian Splats, which can then be exported as a .ply file.
- [nv-tlabs/TokenGS](https://github.com/nv-tlabs/TokenGS) — ⭐ 192 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository introduces TokenGS, a method for 3D Gaussian prediction that decouples it from pixels using learnable tokens. It aims to improve 3D reconstruction quality and training efficiency, particularly for novel view synthesis.
- [interactive-3d/interactive3d](https://github.com/interactive-3d/interactive3d) — ⭐ 189 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository provides the official code for Interactive3D, a system presented at CVPR'24 for interactive 3D content generation. It utilizes Gaussian Splatting to enable users to create desired 3D assets.
- [nerficg-project/faster-gaussian-splatting](https://github.com/nerficg-project/faster-gaussian-splatting) — ⭐ 166 · `Cuda` · Paper Code — This is an efficient and research-friendly framework for Gaussian Splatting, designed to improve the optimization process as detailed in the CVPR'26 paper "Faster-GS". It is used for novel view synthesis and 3D scene representation.
- [RVizSplat/RVizSplat](https://github.com/RVizSplat/RVizSplat) — ⭐ 126 · `C++` · Plugin/Extension — This project provides a plugin for RViz2, a 3D visualization tool, to render high-fidelity 3D Gaussian Splats. It enables users to display detailed 3D reconstructions within the RViz2 environment.
- [ziplab/TriSplat](https://github.com/ziplab/TriSplat) — ⭐ 99 · `Python` · Paper Code — TriSplat is a research project offering a simulation-ready feed-forward 3D scene reconstruction method using Triangle Splatting. It enables novel view synthesis and features an interactive browser-based demo.
- [WilliamLiu-1997/3DGS-PLY-3DTiles-Converter](https://github.com/WilliamLiu-1997/3DGS-PLY-3DTiles-Converter) — ⭐ 88 · `JavaScript` · CLI Tool — This is a JavaScript CLI tool designed to convert Gaussian Splatting PLY files into optimized 3D Tiles. It features adaptive Level of Detail (LOD) simplification and outputs SPZ-compressed GLB files for efficient web visualization.
- [LuLing06/I-Scene-project](https://github.com/LuLing06/I-Scene-project) — ⭐ 82 · `Python` · Paper Code — A project for generating interactive 3D scenes from a single input image, enabling real-to-simulation applications and supporting both 3D Gaussian Splatting and mesh outputs.
- [Cyril-gyd/ULF-Loc](https://github.com/Cyril-gyd/ULF-Loc) — ⭐ 41 · `Jupyter Notebook` · Paper Code — This project provides the code for ULF-Loc, a CVPR 2026 method for robust visual localization, leveraging unbiased landmark features and 3D Gaussian Splatting. It is designed to enhance 3D reconstruction and RGBD SLAM applications.
- [warpgatelabs/RSR](https://github.com/warpgatelabs/RSR) — ⭐ 31 · Application — RSR is a high-performance native Windows VR viewer for 3D Gaussian Splatting scenes. It's built with Direct3D 12 and OpenXR, featuring NVIDIA DLSS support and significant speed optimizations for displaying large 3D environments.
- [kmk97/UGSLoc](https://github.com/kmk97/UGSLoc) — ⭐ 17 · Paper Code — This repository provides code related to rethinking pose refinement in 3D Gaussian Splatting, focusing on pose prior and geometric uncertainty as presented in a CVPR 2026 paper.
- [dozeri83/geo-register-plugin](https://github.com/dozeri83/geo-register-plugin) — ⭐ 15 · `Python` · Plugin/Extension — This is a Python plugin designed to automatically georeference 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) models, simplifying the process of placing 3D models accurately on maps.

</details>

## Scene Understanding

Segment, label, and reason about 3D space from point clouds and depth

<details>
<summary>Show 46 repos</summary>

- [facebookresearch/vggt](https://github.com/facebookresearch/vggt) — ⭐ 13,907 · `Python` · Paper Code — A deep learning model (Transformer) focused on understanding visual geometry, likely for scene understanding in 3D environments from images or other visual data. It's the code for a CVPR 2025 paper.
- [Robbyant/lingbot-map](https://github.com/Robbyant/lingbot-map) — ⭐ 7,029 · `Python` · Library — This repository features a feed-forward 3D foundation model designed for reconstructing detailed 3D scenes from streaming video data. It focuses on understanding and building representations of environments from continuous visual input.
- [facebookresearch/map-anything](https://github.com/facebookresearch/map-anything) — ⭐ 3,419 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository presents MapAnything, a universal feed-forward model designed for metric 3D reconstruction. It can handle a wide range of 3D reconstruction tasks, including depth estimation and multi-view stereo, using a single model.
- [facebookresearch/sam-3d-body](https://github.com/facebookresearch/sam-3d-body) — ⭐ 2,997 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository provides code for running inference with the SAM 3D Body Model (3DB), along with links to download trained model checkpoints and datasets, and example notebooks for its usage.
- [naver/mast3r](https://github.com/naver/mast3r) — ⭐ 2,936 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository provides the code for MASt3R, a method for grounding image matching in 3D. It can generate 3D point clouds from image pairs.
- [NVlabs/FoundationStereo](https://github.com/NVlabs/FoundationStereo) — ⭐ 2,731 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository provides the code for FoundationStereo, a zero-shot stereo matching method nominated for Best Paper at CVPR 2025. It focuses on estimating depth information from a pair of images without prior training on specific datasets.
- [tum-vision/lsd\_slam](https://github.com/tum-vision/lsd_slam) — ⭐ 2,713 · `C++` · Library — This repository implements LSD-SLAM (Large-Scale Direct SLAM), a real-time direct monocular Simultaneous Localization and Mapping algorithm. It enables a system to simultaneously map its environment and localize itself within that environment using only a single camera, without relying on keypoints.
- [facebookresearch/fast3r](https://github.com/facebookresearch/fast3r) — ⭐ 1,551 · `Python` · Paper Code — Fast3R is a research project dedicated to high-speed 3D reconstruction, enabling rapid reconstruction of complex 3D scenes from numerous images in a single forward pass. It aims to boost the efficiency of generating 3D models from visual data.
- [Pointcept/SegmentAnything3D](https://github.com/Pointcept/SegmentAnything3D) — ⭐ 1,337 · `Python` · Paper Code — This project implements SAM3D, a method for segmenting objects in 3D scenes by transferring 2D image segmentation masks to 3D point clouds. It is associated with an ICCV 2023 Workshop paper.
- [facebookresearch/uco3d](https://github.com/facebookresearch/uco3d) — ⭐ 1,326 · `Python` · Dataset — A dataset featuring 170,000 turn-table videos of diverse everyday objects, designed to support 3D research and understanding.
- [MIT-SPARK/Hydra](https://github.com/MIT-SPARK/Hydra) — ⭐ 1,025 · `C++` · Framework — Hydra is a C++ system designed for real-time construction of 3D Scene Graphs using various sensor data inputs. It focuses on understanding and representing complex 3D environments.
- [concept-graphs/concept-graphs](https://github.com/concept-graphs/concept-graphs) — ⭐ 854 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository contains the official code release for ConceptGraphs, a project that generates open-vocabulary 3D scene graphs.
- [jayin92/Skyfall-GS](https://github.com/jayin92/Skyfall-GS) — ⭐ 804 · `Python` · Application — Skyfall-GS synthesizes immersive and photorealistic 3D urban scenes from satellite imagery, using computer vision and diffusion models for 3D reconstruction in computer graphics and earth observation.
- [mystorm16/FastVGGT](https://github.com/mystorm16/FastVGGT) — ⭐ 771 · `Python` · Paper Code — FastVGGT is a Visual Geometry Transformer that accelerates long-sequence 3D reconstruction by leveraging similarities in attention maps. It achieves up to 4x faster inference without accuracy loss, designed for research related to 3D scene understanding.
- [PRBonn/OverlapNet](https://github.com/PRBonn/OverlapNet) — ⭐ 729 · `Python` · Paper Code — OverlapNet is a system that performs loop closing for 3D LiDAR-based SLAM, improving the accuracy and consistency of 3D environment mapping for robotic applications.
- [martinruenz/maskfusion](https://github.com/martinruenz/maskfusion) — ⭐ 584 · `C++` · Paper Code — MaskFusion implements a real-time semantic Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) system capable of recognizing, tracking, and reconstructing multiple moving objects in 3D using RGB-D camera data. It is designed for dynamic scene understanding and mapping.
- [Junyi42/LoGeR](https://github.com/Junyi42/LoGeR) — ⭐ 568 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository contains a Python-based reimplementation of the LoGeR model, which focuses on long-context geometric reconstruction using a hybrid memory approach. It's likely research code for 3D environment understanding and processing.
- [allenai/WildDet3D](https://github.com/allenai/WildDet3D) — ⭐ 551 · `Python` · Paper Code — WildDet3D is a research project by the Allen Institute for AI, focusing on scalable and promptable 3D object detection and localization in diverse, real-world environments. It is designed to work with data from platforms like Project Aria, enabling world-coordinates based detection.
- [amir32002/3D\_Street\_View](https://github.com/amir32002/3D_Street_View) — ⭐ 485 · Dataset — This repository hosts a dataset comprising 25 million street view images, camera poses, and 3D city models. It was used in research for generic 3D representation via pose estimation and matching.
- [zju3dv/Scal3R](https://github.com/zju3dv/Scal3R) — ⭐ 442 · `Python` · Paper Code — Scal3R is a research model for scalable test-time training in large-scale 3D reconstruction, capable of transforming kilometer-scale video streams into detailed 3D scenes.
- [cgtuebingen/3D-RE-GEN](https://github.com/cgtuebingen/3D-RE-GEN) — ⭐ 441 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository presents a generative framework for reconstructing indoor scenes in 3D from single input images. The output scenes are editable 3D models.
- [H-EmbodVis/VEGA-3D](https://github.com/H-EmbodVis/VEGA-3D) — ⭐ 432 · `Python` · Framework — VEGA-3D is a framework enabling AI models to understand 3D spatial information from videos by repurposing pretrained video diffusion models. It acts as a 'Latent World Simulator' to aid scene understanding, reducing reliance on scarce 3D data.
- [Haian-Jin/ZipMap](https://github.com/Haian-Jin/ZipMap) — ⭐ 428 · `Python` · Paper Code — ZipMap is a method for linear-time stateful 3D reconstruction, employing test-time training, as presented in a CVPR 2026 paper.
- [ferrolho/VL53L5CX-BNO08X-viewer](https://github.com/ferrolho/VL53L5CX-BNO08X-viewer) — ⭐ 403 · `Python` · Application — This project enables users to transform inexpensive Time-of-Flight sensors into a real-time 3D scanner. It allows for mapping rooms and environments in 3D using low-cost hardware.
- [facebookresearch/scenescript](https://github.com/facebookresearch/scenescript) — ⭐ 371 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository contains the public code release for SceneScript, a research project likely focused on AI, machine learning, and agents for understanding or generating scenes in real systems.
- [Mengmouxu/SceneGen](https://github.com/Mengmouxu/SceneGen) — ⭐ 347 · `Jupyter Notebook` · Paper Code — SceneGen is a project that generates complete 3D scenes from a single 2D input image in one feedforward pass. It uses an AI-driven approach to create 3D environments directly from visual data.
- [HKUST-Aerial-Robotics/G3Reg](https://github.com/HKUST-Aerial-Robotics/G3Reg) — ⭐ 319 · `C++` · Library — This is a C++ library designed for fast and robust global registration of LiDAR point clouds, specifically for outdoor environments, used for tasks like 3D scene reconstruction or localization.
- [prs-eth/LitePT](https://github.com/prs-eth/LitePT) — ⭐ 309 · `Python` · Paper Code — LitePT is a lightweight and high-performance Point Transformer architecture designed for a wide range of 3D point cloud understanding tasks. It was presented as a highlight paper at CVPR 2026.
- [TencentARC/CustomNet](https://github.com/TencentARC/CustomNet) — ⭐ 279 · `Python` · Paper Code — CustomNet is a system that allows users to insert custom 3D objects into existing scenes, intelligently adjusting their placement and appearance based on variable viewpoints.
- [MIT-SPARK/BUFFER-X](https://github.com/MIT-SPARK/BUFFER-X) — ⭐ 264 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository presents BUFFER-X, a method for zero-shot point cloud registration, which aligns 3D point clouds without requiring specific retraining. It's designed for applications involving Lidar and RGB-D data analysis.
- [Maddog241/mvinverse](https://github.com/Maddog241/mvinverse) — ⭐ 164 · `Python` · Paper Code — This project provides the code for MVInverse, a feedforward multi-view inverse rendering method. It aims to reconstruct consistent 3D scene properties from multiple input images quickly.
- [AdaptiveMotorControlLab/FMPose3D](https://github.com/AdaptiveMotorControlLab/FMPose3D) — ⭐ 146 · `Python` · Paper Code — FMPose3D provides an algorithm and accompanying code for monocular 3D pose estimation, designed to accurately track the three-dimensional movements of humans and other animals from a single camera feed. It leverages flow matching techniques to infer 3D poses from 2D image inputs.
- [zhigangjiang/LGT-Net](https://github.com/zhigangjiang/LGT-Net) — ⭐ 123 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository provides a PyTorch implementation for 'LGT-Net', a research paper focused on estimating indoor panoramic room layouts. It utilizes a geometry-aware transformer network to understand 3D scene geometry from panoramic images.
- [pypose/bae](https://github.com/pypose/bae) — ⭐ 104 · `Python` · Library — A Python library that implements Bundle Adjustment in 'eager mode' for efficient 3D structure and camera pose optimization. It offers significant GPU acceleration for large-scale problems, outperforming traditional C++ libraries.
- [neu-vi/UniCorrn](https://github.com/neu-vi/UniCorrn) — ⭐ 65 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository presents UniCorrn, a unified correspondence transformer model designed to establish relationships across both 2D and 3D data, as detailed in an upcoming CVPR 2026 paper.
- [Ropedia/SpatialBench](https://github.com/Ropedia/SpatialBench) — ⭐ 62 · `Python` · Paper Code — SpatialBench is a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate the performance of spatial foundation models. It utilizes a diverse collection of 19 source datasets, over 540 scenes, 40+ model variants, and 6 reconstruction paradigms to assess their capabilities in 3D reconstruction and spatial understanding.
- [cvlab-kaist/TrackCraft3r](https://github.com/cvlab-kaist/TrackCraft3r) — ⭐ 50 · `Python` · Paper Code — This project provides the official code for TrackCraft3R, a method that repurposes video diffusion transformers for dense 3D tracking tasks.
- [haoz19/world-tracing](https://github.com/haoz19/world-tracing) — ⭐ 31 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository provides the official inference code for the 'World Tracing' method, a research project focused on understanding and tracing dynamic objects and scenes in 3D environments. It accompanies a scientific paper and includes resources for live demonstrations.
- [zhangganlin/BA-T](https://github.com/zhangganlin/BA-T) — ⭐ 23 · Paper Code — An iterative transformer model designed for two-view bundle adjustment, used to refine 3D scene structure and camera poses from pairs of images. This work provides the code implementation for a research paper.
- [Jiang-HB/FUSER](https://github.com/Jiang-HB/FUSER) — ⭐ 22 · `Python` · Paper Code — FUSER is a research project presenting a Feed-Forward Multiview 3D Registration Transformer with SE(3)^N Diffusion Refinement, designed to improve state-of-the-art 3D reconstruction by moving beyond conventional pairwise approaches.
- [Hongcheng-Gao/SpatialWorld](https://github.com/Hongcheng-Gao/SpatialWorld) — ⭐ 19 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository hosts the code for 'SpatialWorld', a research project linked to a scientific paper. It likely focuses on AI research related to spatial understanding or generation in a 3D context.
- [caiyuchen-ustc/EffOPD](https://github.com/caiyuchen-ustc/EffOPD) — ⭐ 13 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository provides the official code implementation for "EffOPD: Efficient One-Pass 3D Pose Diffusion", a research paper focused on efficient 3D human pose estimation and generation. It serves as an accompanying resource to the paper and its related dataset.
- [xieyizheng/DeepShapeMatchingKit](https://github.com/xieyizheng/DeepShapeMatchingKit) — ⭐ 12 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository provides a Python codebase for deep functional map methods applied to 3D shape matching, featuring an optimized batched solver, various method implementations, and evaluation metrics.
- [u7079256/LinStereo](https://github.com/u7079256/LinStereo) — ⭐ 11 · `HTML` · Paper Code — LinStereo is a project page for a research paper on linear-complexity global attention for multi-scale iterative underwater stereo matching, aiming to improve depth estimation in challenging aquatic environments.
- [facebookresearch/projectaria\_gen2\_depth\_from\_stereo](https://github.com/facebookresearch/projectaria_gen2_depth_from_stereo) — ⭐ 11 · `Jupyter Notebook` · Paper Code — This repository offers a tutorial and tools to compute depth-from-stereo using Project Aria Gen2 devices. It covers stereo image rectification and disparity estimation for real-time, metric depth sensing and 3D scene understanding.
- [nv-tlabs/learning-convex-decomposition](https://github.com/nv-tlabs/learning-convex-decomposition) — ⭐ 10 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository contains the code for a research paper on "learning convex decomposition," presented at CVPR, likely focusing on geometric analysis or shape understanding in 3D contexts.

</details>

## Modeling Tools

AI copilots wired into Blender and the rest of your 3D pipeline

<details>
<summary>Show 20 repos</summary>

- [ahujasid/blender-mcp](https://github.com/ahujasid/blender-mcp) — ⭐ 22,191 · `Python` · Plugin/Extension — A project related to Blender, likely a plugin or utility, given its name 'blender-mcp'.
- [blender/blender](https://github.com/blender/blender) — ⭐ 18,725 · `C++` · Application — Blender is an official open-source 3D creation suite primarily focused on 3D computer graphics tasks. It supports modeling, animation, rendering, and also has video editing capabilities.
- [isl-org/Open3D](https://github.com/isl-org/Open3D) — ⭐ 13,637 · `C++` · Library — Open3D is a GPU-accelerated library for 3D data processing, visualization, and computer graphics. It provides tools for tasks such as 3D reconstruction, mesh processing, point cloud operations, and rendering.
- [Mesh2Motion/mesh2motion-app](https://github.com/Mesh2Motion/mesh2motion-app) — ⭐ 2,558 · `TypeScript` · Application — This application allows users to import 3D models and automatically assign and export animations, simplifying the process of animating custom 3D assets.
- [CloudAI-X/threejs-skills](https://github.com/CloudAI-X/threejs-skills) — ⭐ 2,328 · Skill Pack — This repository provides a collection of development skills for Claude Code, enabling the AI to assist with tasks related to Three.js, a JavaScript 3D library used for creating interactive 3D graphics on the web.
- [st-tech/ppf-contact-solver](https://github.com/st-tech/ppf-contact-solver) — ⭐ 1,730 · `Python` · Library — This is an open-source physics-based contact solver for simulating interactions between various deformable and rigid bodies like cloth, solids, and rods. It includes an official Blender add-on for seamless integration into 3D modeling workflows.
- [zalo/CascadeStudio](https://github.com/zalo/CascadeStudio) — ⭐ 1,379 · `JavaScript` · Application — This project is a live-scripted CAD kernel that runs entirely within the browser, enabling code-driven 3D modeling using concepts like BREP and integrating OpenCASCADE.
- [flopperam/unreal-engine-mcp](https://github.com/flopperam/unreal-engine-mcp) — ⭐ 914 · `C++` · MCP Server — This project allows users to control Unreal Engine 5.5+ using natural language commands, enabling the AI-powered creation of complex 3D worlds, architectural structures, and environments.
- [NVlabs/SOMA-X](https://github.com/NVlabs/SOMA-X) — ⭐ 511 · `Python` · Framework — SOMA-X is a framework from NVIDIA Labs that unifies various parametric human body models. It provides tools for digital human creation, character rigging, and pose estimation in 3D environments.
- [PozzettiAndrea/ComfyUI-UniRig](https://github.com/PozzettiAndrea/ComfyUI-UniRig) — ⭐ 392 · `Python` · Plugin/Extension — This is a ComfyUI wrapper for UniRig, designed to automate 3D character rigging processes within the ComfyUI environment.
- [sengchor/kokraf](https://github.com/sengchor/kokraf) — ⭐ 297 · `JavaScript` · Application — Kokraf is a collaborative 3D modeling application accessible on the web. It includes a unique AI-generated texturing feature that renders models from multiple sides to project generated textures back onto the 3D assets.
- [ierror/synaps-cad](https://github.com/ierror/synaps-cad) — ⭐ 292 · `Rust` · Application — SynapsCAD is an AI-powered 3D CAD IDE that allows users to edit OpenSCAD code, visualize 3D models in real-time, and reshape designs using natural language interaction.
- [OpenGeometry-io/OpenGeometry](https://github.com/OpenGeometry-io/OpenGeometry) — ⭐ 272 · `Rust` · Library — OpenGeometry is a powerful CAD (Computer-Aided Design) kernel built with Rust, specifically designed for web applications. It enables users to create and manipulate graphics and drafts directly within a browser environment.
- [scottstts/Threejs-Awesome-Graphics-Agent-Skills](https://github.com/scottstts/Threejs-Awesome-Graphics-Agent-Skills) — ⭐ 270 · `JavaScript` · Skill Pack — This repository provides agent skills designed for the three.js library, enabling AI agents to generate 3D graphics for scenes and games. It facilitates the creation of visual elements and models within a 3D environment.
- [FreedomIntelligence/BlenderLLM](https://github.com/FreedomIntelligence/BlenderLLM) — ⭐ 237 · `Python` · Application — BlenderLLM is a large language model designed to generate Blender CAD scripts from natural language instructions, enabling users to create and render 3D models by text description.
- [zacharyfmarion/openscad-studio](https://github.com/zacharyfmarion/openscad-studio) — ⭐ 173 · `TypeScript` · Application — This project offers a professional development environment for OpenSCAD, designed to create 2D and 3D designs with AI assistance. It replaces the stock OpenSCAD editor, providing features like live preview, real-time diagnostics, and an AI copilot.
- [zekunhao1995/DualSDF](https://github.com/zekunhao1995/DualSDF) — ⭐ 142 · `Python` · Application — DualSDF is a research project providing a system for semantic 3D shape manipulation using a two-level representation. It allows users to edit 3D models with a browser-based interface.
- [MrXujiang/HiCAD](https://github.com/MrXujiang/HiCAD) — ⭐ 49 · `JavaScript` · Application — HiCAD is an AI-driven CAD modeling platform that generates 3D models from text descriptions. It translates natural language input into parametric modeling code using large language models, allowing users to preview and edit designs directly in the browser.
- [Dennis-JwWeng/PartFlow](https://github.com/Dennis-JwWeng/PartFlow) — ⭐ 19 · `Python` · Paper Code — PartFlow is a system for two-stage, image-conditioned 3D editing that utilizes semantic-part transformations to achieve scalable and high-quality manipulation of 3D objects.
- [Braffolk/fable5-world-demo](https://github.com/Braffolk/fable5-world-demo) — ⭐ 15 · `TypeScript` · Tutorial/Course — This repository demonstrates a 3D world created primarily by Claude Fable 5 using three.js, serving as a practical test and showcase of the AI's capabilities in generating interactive 3D environments.

</details>

## Rendering

Neural and differentiable renderers that turn geometry into pixels fast

<details>
<summary>Show 14 repos</summary>

- [mrdoob/three.js](https://github.com/mrdoob/three.js) — ⭐ 112,522 · `JavaScript` · Library — Three.js is a JavaScript library for creating and displaying animated 3D graphics in a web browser, widely used for browser games and other interactive 3D experiences.
- [lettier/3d-game-shaders-for-beginners](https://github.com/lettier/3d-game-shaders-for-beginners) — ⭐ 19,649 · `C++` · Tutorial/Course — A comprehensive step-by-step guide for beginners on implementing various 3D game shaders and lighting techniques, including SSAO, depth of field, and normal mapping.
- [nagix/mini-tokyo-3d](https://github.com/nagix/mini-tokyo-3d) — ⭐ 4,103 · `JavaScript` · Application — A real-time 3D digital map that visualizes Tokyo's public transport system, allowing users to see the network in a three-dimensional representation.
- [NASA-AMMOS/3DTilesRendererJS](https://github.com/NASA-AMMOS/3DTilesRendererJS) — ⭐ 2,303 · `JavaScript` · Library — This is a Javascript renderer for 3D Tiles, integrating with popular libraries like three.js, Babylon.js, and r3f. It's designed for visualizing geospatial 3D data such as terrain and tile-sets.
- [Nearcyan/vibecraft](https://github.com/Nearcyan/vibecraft) — ⭐ 1,397 · `TypeScript` · Application — Vibecraft visualizes user sessions from Claude Code in an interactive 3D hexagonal grid. It's a tool designed to offer a unique visual representation of coding activities.
- [silvertakana/worldwideview](https://github.com/silvertakana/worldwideview) — ⭐ 1,335 · `TypeScript` · Application — A TypeScript application that visualizes live global data on an interactive 3D globe, leveraging CesiumJS to render worldwide information dynamically.
- [SebLague/Fluid-Sim](https://github.com/SebLague/Fluid-Sim) — ⭐ 1,271 · `C#` · Application — This repository provides a simple particle-based fluid simulation, originally a classic Unity project, now rewritten to utilize WebGPU for advanced rendering techniques like raymarching and screen-space fluid rendering. It demonstrates simulating and visualizing a large number of particles.
- [playcanvas/splat-transform](https://github.com/playcanvas/splat-transform) — ⭐ 753 · `TypeScript` · CLI Tool — A CLI tool and library for processing and converting 3D Gaussian splat data, which are used to represent and render 3D scenes, enabling manipulation and transformation of these visual assets.
- [SardineFish/raindrop-fx](https://github.com/SardineFish/raindrop-fx) — ⭐ 572 · `TypeScript` · Library — This project implements an optimized raindrop effect on glass using WebGL2, designed for real-time graphics applications rendered in a browser.
- [cartesiancs/map3d](https://github.com/cartesiancs/map3d) — ⭐ 375 · `TypeScript` · Application — This tool generates interactive 3D city maps from OpenStreetMap data, displaying building and road information. It utilizes R3F and Three.js for rendering, enabling detailed visualization of geographical data.
- [milos-agathon/forge3d](https://github.com/milos-agathon/forge3d) — ⭐ 283 · `Rust` · Library — Forge3d is a Rust-first, cross-platform wgpu/WebGPU renderer, offering fast, headless 3D rendering capabilities to Python. It can render complex 3D scenes, like satellite timelapses with draped imagery and terrain.
- [jeantimex/flight-path](https://github.com/jeantimex/flight-path) — ⭐ 282 · `TypeScript` · Application — This repository provides a visualization tool that simulates and renders thousands of flight paths on a photorealistic 3D globe using Three.js.
- [scomup/q3dviewer](https://github.com/scomup/q3dviewer) — ⭐ 103 · `Python` · Application — This repository offers a simple point cloud rendering solution, leveraging the latest version of cloud\_viewer for visualization.
- [songsummer920-dazzle/three-scope-map-skill](https://github.com/songsummer920-dazzle/three-scope-map-skill) — ⭐ 25 · `Vue` · Library — A Vue.js component or module designed to integrate and display interactive 3D maps within web applications.

</details>

## Other

Avatars, 4D motion, and point-cloud utilities worth a look

- [oso95/scroll-world](https://github.com/oso95/scroll-world) — ⭐ 1,399 · `JavaScript` · Library — This project provides a "skill" to transform a brand's content into an interactive, scrollable 3D world experience, likely for web-based presentations or marketing purposes.
- [andyhuo520/aetherviz-master](https://github.com/andyhuo520/aetherviz-master) — ⭐ 918 · Application — An interactive educational visualization tool that transforms teaching topics into immersive 3D interactive web pages, generating complete modules with simulations and quizzes.
- [SkyworkAI/Matrix-3D](https://github.com/SkyworkAI/Matrix-3D) — ⭐ 754 · `Python` · Application — This repository enables the generation of large-scale, explorable 3D scenes and high-quality panorama videos from a single image or text prompt. It focuses on creating immersive 3D worlds using AI.
- [nepfaff/scenesmith](https://github.com/nepfaff/scenesmith) — ⭐ 379 · `Python` · Framework — SceneSmith is a system for agentic generation of simulation-ready indoor scenes, creating complex 3D environments. It often generates these scenes from textual prompts for use in simulations.
- [Tencent-Hunyuan/HY3D-Bench](https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/HY3D-Bench) — ⭐ 305 · `Python` · Dataset — This repository contains HY3D-Bench, a comprehensive 3D dataset of 600,000 high-quality objects. It is designed for benchmarking and research in various 3D applications.
- [aren227/unity-fluid-simulation](https://github.com/aren227/unity-fluid-simulation) — ⭐ 127 · `C#` · Plugin/Extension — This repository provides a real-time Smoothed Particle Hydrodynamics (SPH) fluid simulation implemented within the Unity game engine, capable of simulating up to 1 million particles on a GPU.
- [dhanush777x/protoviz-3d](https://github.com/dhanush777x/protoviz-3d) — ⭐ 117 · `TypeScript` · Application — Protoviz 3D is an interactive, web-based 3D visualizer for communication protocols like UART and I2C, designed to help students and engineers understand what happens on the wire.
- [IridiumIO/PolyCut](https://github.com/IridiumIO/PolyCut) — ⭐ 115 · `Visual Basic .NET` · Application — Polycut is a desktop application that converts SVG files into 2D GCode for 3D printers, effectively allowing them to function as vinyl cutters, plotters, or foil stampers. It supports direct uploading to networked 3D printers via Klipper.
- [thebuggeddev/football-stadium](https://github.com/thebuggeddev/football-stadium) — ⭐ 39 · `HTML` · Application — A web-based 3D visualization of a football stadium, allowing users to virtually view their seat location before purchasing tickets.
- [Prompt-Surfer/obsidian-jarvis-ui](https://github.com/Prompt-Surfer/obsidian-jarvis-ui) — ⭐ 27 · `TypeScript` · Plugin/Extension — This Obsidian plugin provides a 3D WebGL-based graph visualization for your note vault, featuring an Iron Man/Jarvis-inspired aesthetic. It helps users explore connections between their notes in a visually engaging way.
